description: Cash & marketable securities fall below $100M, an Orion early-warning level well above the $15M covenant floor.
calculation_or_rule: Reported cash 115,238 + marketable securities 51,810 = 167,048; base = Q2'26 projected ending cash & MS.
notes: Base case does not cross $100M until FY2028 (~85,254 YE); Downside crosses in Q4 2026 (95,456).

description: Cash & marketable securities fall below $75M — heightened liquidity stress and a likely capital-raise trigger.
calculation_or_rule: Threshold breach when total cash & MS < 75,000.
notes: Base never below 75M through 2029 (FY2029 YE ~24,398); Downside crosses in Q1 2027 (67,471).

description: Cash & marketable securities fall below $50M — severe stress; runway to the covenant floor measured in a few quarters.
calculation_or_rule: Threshold breach when total cash & MS < 50,000.
notes: Base FY2029 YE ~24,398 (below 50M only at the very end); Downside crosses in Q2 2027 (39,161).

description: Orion indicative headroom over the $15M minimum-liquidity covenant falls below $25M — an early-warning band, NOT a legal breach.
metric: Indicative covenant headroom (qualifying cash less $15M floor)
calculation_or_rule: Headroom = qualifying cash - 15,000. Indicative (uses reported cash+MS), not covenant-basis.
notes: Orion early-warning threshold, distinct from the legal covenant breach (CMP-06). Base first < 25M in FY2029 (~8,398); Downside in Q2 2027 (23,161).

description: Qualifying (unrestricted, controlled-account) cash approaches the $15M minimum-liquidity covenant floor — proximity monitor to the sole financial covenant.
source_name: 2024 Loan Agreement Sec. 6.16 / Orion liquidity workbook
calculation_or_rule: Qualifying cash ~= cash+MS 167,048 less restricted 240 less excluded accts ~750. Covenant floor 15,000, tested continuously.
notes: MATERIAL FLAG: if ~$61.6M is UDENYCA-TSA pass-through and not covenant-qualifying, qualifying cash ~$105M and breach-absent-capital moves ~2 qtrs earlier. VERIFY controlled-account cash directly.

description: Liquidity runway (normalized) falls below 18 months — first-tier runway early warning.
metric: Liquidity runway (normalized, cash & MS / normalized monthly burn)
required_action: Confirm Q2 2026 normalized burn vs the ~$8.8M/mo base; recompute runway on covenant-qualifying (not reported) cash to test the TSA sensitivity.
calculation_or_rule: Runway = ending cash & MS / normalized monthly burn. Base hovers 17.7-20.4 mo — at/near the 18-mo line.
notes: Reported runway is ~11.8 mo but distorted by a one-time ~$21M Q1'26 TSA settlement in operating burn; normalized runway ~18 mo. On covenant-qualifying cash (ex-TSA) runway is materially shorter.

description: Liquidity runway falls below 12 months — capital-raise should be underway; second-tier runway warning.
calculation_or_rule: Runway < 12 months. Base stays >17 mo through the horizon.
notes: Downside crosses below 12 mo in Q4 2026 (9.8 mo). Reported (TSA-distorted) runway 11.8 mo already below this line — treat as data-quality caveat, not a confirmed trigger.

description: Liquidity runway falls below 6 months — imminent covenant-floor risk; escalate.
calculation_or_rule: Runway < 6 months.
notes: Downside crosses below 6 mo in Q2 2027 (4.1 mo), consistent with Downside covenant breach ~Q3 2027.

description: Reported quarterly total net revenue comes in below the Orion base-case projection for that quarter.
required_action: On Q2 2026 reporting (~2026-08-06), compare actual total net revenue to the $13,075K Q2 base; flag Watch if below base, and reassess the LOQTORZI ramp.
calculation_or_rule: Compares the reporting quarter's ACTUAL total revenue to that quarter's base. Warning = actual < base Q2'26 13,075; critical = actual < 90% of base (11,768). Pending Q2 2026 actual — no like-for-like base exists for Q1'26 (Base scenario starts Q2'26).
notes: Prior quarter Q1'26 total revenue 12,310 missed ~14,430 consensus (-14.7%); management guided a return to growth in Q2 2026. Held Information Unavailable until Q2 actual prints to avoid comparing Q1 actual against a Q2 projection.

description: LOQTORZI net product revenue declines sequentially (QoQ) — the sole-product franchise is the entire near-term top line.
required_action: Confirm whether the Q1'26 sequential dip reverses in Q2 2026 as guided; a second consecutive QoQ decline escalates to Triggered.
calculation_or_rule: Warning when QoQ growth < 0. Q1'26 LOQTORZI net rev ~11,800 (-4.8% QoQ, +61% YoY). Base Q2'26 QoQ ~+7.6%.
notes: Q1'26 sequential decline attributed by management to winter-storm disruption; YoY still +61%. Single-quarter, weather-related — watched, not confirmed trend.

description: Actual quarterly revenue deviates from the base/consensus expectation by more than 10% (either direction, downside-weighted).
required_action: Q1'26 missed by ~14.7%; track Q2 2026 (~2026-08-06) to confirm the guided rebound and reassess FY2026 revenue vs the $52.2M LOQTORZI base.
calculation_or_rule: Signed variance = (actual - expected)/expected. Warning if variance <= -10%; critical if <= -15%. Q1'26: (12,310-14,430)/14,430 = -14.7% -> trips the -10% warning tier (a downside miss). Use signed <= (not abs) so upside beats do not alarm.
notes: TRIGGERED on the Q1 2026 miss (evidence: earnings release). Management guided return to growth Q2 2026; downgrade to Watch if Q2 lands within 10% of base.

description: Normalized quarterly operating cash burn exceeds the Orion base-case burn.
required_action: Strip one-time TSA items from Q2 2026 operating cash flow and compare normalized burn to the ~$26.4M base; investigate any structural (non-TSA) overrun.
calculation_or_rule: Base normalized quarterly burn = 8,815/mo x 3 = 26,445 (Q2'26). Warning if normalized burn exceeds base.
notes: Reported Q1'26 operating burn 57,886 includes a one-time ~$21M UDENYCA-TSA settlement; normalized recurring burn ~$28-30M/qtr, modestly above base.

description: Product gross margin erodes below the base-case ~69% (e.g., from Junshi royalty step-ups or higher gross-to-net deductions).
calculation_or_rule: Gross margin = gross profit / total net revenue. Warning if < 65%.
notes: LOQTORZI carries a low-20s% Junshi royalty (in COGS/revenue-participation); base holds ~69%. Watch for reimbursement/gross-to-net pressure.

description: Total operating expenses (COGS + R&D + SG&A) exceed the Orion base-case for the quarter.
required_action: Extract Q2 2026 total opex from the 10-Q and compare to the $47,532K base; flag pipeline-driven R&D step-ups above plan.
calculation_or_rule: Warning if quarterly opex > base 47,532; critical if > 110% of base (52,285).
notes: Management reduced opex in Q1 2026; exact Q1'26 total opex not isolated in this framework. Pipeline readouts (2026-2027) are the main upside-spend risk.

description: The cumulative external capital (ATM/equity + earnouts) required to hold the covenant to maturity rises above the base plan.
metric: Total external capital required through May 2029
required_action: Re-run the funding bridge each quarter; if required external capital rises toward the Downside ~$222M, escalate — survival is contingent on serial ATM access.
source_page_or_section: Total external capital required through May 2029
calculation_or_rule: Cumulative equity/ATM + earnouts to hold >$15M covenant to maturity. Base ~154,000; Downside ~222,439; Upside ~125,000.
notes: Central credit finding: liquidity/capital-markets access — not the $38.66M maturity or franchise durability — is the binding constraint. TSA sensitivity adds ~$60M to the requirement.

alert_name: ATM / equity issuance below required levels
description: Actual ATM/equity proceeds fall short of the ~$20M/qtr the base case needs to hold the covenant floor.
required_action: Track actual ATM utilization / equity issuance each 10-Q and prospectus supplement against the ~$20M/qtr base requirement; a shortfall accelerates the covenant path.
calculation_or_rule: Base models ~$20M/qtr ATM (minimum to hold covenant). Warning if actual proceeds < required.
notes: No mandatory-prepayment sweep on equity proceeds — cash stays with the company. Financing capacity is share-price-sensitive (see CAP-02).

description: CHRS share price falls to levels that impair ATM capacity (more dilution per dollar) or threaten Nasdaq listing compliance.
required_action: Monitor price and 30-day average; below $1.00 raises Nasdaq minimum-bid-price risk and sharply raises dilution to raise the ~$154M needed — reassess ATM feasibility.
calculation_or_rule: Warning if close < $1.50; critical if < $1.00 (listing/financing stress).
notes: Close $1.40 on 2026-07-17 (prev $1.38); ~154.25M shares; mkt cap ~$215.95M. Low price is the key constraint on ATM-funded survival.

description: Coherus incurs new indebtedness or grants liens outside permitted baskets — potential structural subordination or covenant issue.
calculation_or_rule: Event: any new debt/lien in 8-K/10-Q. Only Permitted Indebtedness/Liens allowed; term loan is first-lien senior secured.
notes: Convertibles substantially retired (2026 notes ~$0.1M stub repaid Apr 2026); cross-default exposure limited. Large convertible basket (>$350M / 25% mkt cap) is junior/unsecured.

description: Projected cash at the May 2029 maturity is insufficient to repay the $38.66M term loan, creating a refinancing need.
source_page_or_section: 2029 refinancing requirement / Cash available at maturity
calculation_or_rule: Refi need = principal not coverable by maturity cash. Base cash at maturity ~$61.4M (>$38.66M) -> 0; Downside -> full $38,660 refi + $222M shortfall.
notes: Base repayment is CONTINGENT on ~$154M cumulative ATM/equity access; Downside implies covenant breach 2027 and distressed refinancing/restructuring.

description: The 2029 term loan enters a 24-month-to-maturity window — refinancing planning should be active.
calculation_or_rule: Months to maturity from build date (2026-07-20) ~33.6. Window opens 2027-05-08.
notes: Interest-only bullet, no amortization; prepayment premium 0% after year 3 (i.e., after 2027-05-08).

description: The 2029 term loan enters an 18-month-to-maturity window.
calculation_or_rule: Window opens 2027-11-08.
notes: Refinancing visibility should be firm by this window absent full cash repayment capacity.

description: The 2029 term loan enters a 12-month-to-maturity window — refinancing/repayment plan must be committed.
calculation_or_rule: Window opens 2028-05-08.
notes: Within 12 months the loan is a current maturity for the borrower's going-concern assessment.

description: The 2029 term loan enters a 6-month-to-maturity window — escalate to imminent repayment/refinancing execution.
calculation_or_rule: Window opens 2028-11-08.
notes: Change-of-control is the only mandatory-prepayment trigger; otherwise repayment is a bullet at 2029-05-08.

description: Orion estimated recovery on BBDC's first-lien exposure falls below 90 cents on the dollar.
metric: Estimated recovery on 2029 first-lien term loan
source_page_or_section: Recovery — Going Concern / Distressed GC / Liquidation
calculation_or_rule: Recovery % on the $38.66M first-lien facility. Base/solvent ~100%; Reported ~95-100%; Downside ~58% blended.
notes: First-lien senior-secured on substantially all assets + IP; recovery is scenario-driven. Downside blended ~58% would breach the 90% and 75% tiers.

description: Orion estimated recovery falls below 75% — meaningful impairment risk on the first-lien position.
metric: Estimated recovery on 2029 first-lien term loan
calculation_or_rule: Warning if recovery < 75%. Downside distressed-GC ~78%, liquidation ~38%, blended ~58%.
notes: Crossed only in the Downside pathway (covenant breach ~Q3 2027 -> restructuring). Tie to CRQ shadow-rating downgrade.

description: Orion estimated recovery falls below 50% — approaching a liquidation-style outcome.
metric: Estimated recovery on 2029 first-lien term loan
calculation_or_rule: Warning if recovery < 50%. Downside liquidation floor ~38%.
notes: Only a pure-liquidation Downside (~38%) breaches this tier; blended Downside recovery ~58%.

description: Indicative minimum-liquidity headroom deteriorates materially quarter-over-quarter (trend monitor, complements the absolute LIQ-04 threshold).
metric: QoQ change in indicative covenant headroom
required_action: Track QoQ headroom change each quarter; a decline faster than the ~$10M warning threshold (vs the ~$7.4M modeled base burn) signals accelerating stress — investigate drivers.
calculation_or_rule: Base headroom declines ~$7.4M from 152,048 (Q1'26) to 144,602 (Q2'26) before financing. Warning if QoQ decline > $10M.
notes: Structural deterioration is expected (cash-burning borrower); the alert is for acceleration beyond the modeled burn. Distinct from the legal breach (CMP-06).

description: A Responsible-Officer compliance certificate is not delivered within 5 business days of the quarterly/annual financial delivery.
calculation_or_rule: Certificate due within 5 business days of each quarterly/annual financial delivery. Next: Q2 2026 (~2026-08-14).
notes: No default reported to date; certificate is the formal covenant-compliance representation each period.

description: A required 10-Q (45 days) or 10-K (90 days) is not filed by its deadline (EDGAR filing = deemed delivery under the loan).
calculation_or_rule: Q2 2026 10-Q due within 45 days of 2026-06-30 = 2026-08-14. Late filing = reporting-covenant default (core, no cure).
notes: History of timely filing. Watch for any NT 10-Q/NT 10-K (Rule 12b-25) as an early signal.

description: A required written notice to the lender (Default/EoD, ERISA event, Material Adverse Change within 5 business days; litigation/FDA prompt) is triggered.
calculation_or_rule: Event: any Default/ERISA/MAC (5 bus. days) or material litigation/FDA matter (prompt). Monitor 8-K/press flow.
notes: A missing notice is itself a covenant issue; watch for FDA actions or material litigation touching LOQTORZI.

description: Facts emerge that could constitute an Event of Default (incl. a Material Adverse Change, which is a standalone EoD given the thin covenant package).
calculation_or_rule: Core-covenant breaches have NO cure period; MAC is a standalone EoD; voluntary bankruptcy auto-accelerates.
notes: MAC is the practical early lever since there is no performance covenant. No EoD at 9/30/25, 12/31/25 or 3/31/26.

description: LEGAL breach of the sole financial covenant: qualifying (unrestricted, controlled-account) cash below $15,000K at any time.
calculation_or_rule: Breach when qualifying cash < 15,000 (continuous test, core covenant, NO cure period). LEGAL breach line — distinct from Orion early-warning LIQ-04/LIQ-05.
notes: Base holds >$15M through 2029 (contingent on ~$154M ATM); Downside breaches ~Q3 2027. TSA sensitivity moves breach ~2 qtrs earlier. Company reported full compliance at 3/31/26.

description: A waiver or amendment to the 2029 Loan Agreement is disclosed — often a sign of covenant stress or negotiated relief.
calculation_or_rule: Event: any disclosed amendment/waiver to the 2029 term loan.
notes: Only amendment to date is the June 2024 royalty Omnibus (not a term-loan amendment). A future covenant waiver would be a material negative signal.

description: Orion issuer or loan shadow rating is lowered from the current B- issuer / B+ loan.
warning_threshold: Downgrade below B- issuer / B+ loan
calculation_or_rule: Downgrade trigger = ATM/equity access closing or covenant path materializing -> Downside CCC issuer / CCC+ loan.
notes: Current: B- issuer / B+ loan, Stable, Heightened Monitoring. Upside -> B / BB-. Not an S&P/Moody's/Fitch rating.

description: Orion rating outlook moves to Negative from the current Stable.
calculation_or_rule: Outlook flips to Negative in the Downside scenario.
notes: Already on Heightened Monitoring given the liquidity/ATM dependency; a formal Negative outlook would follow evidence of impaired capital access.

description: Position placed on CreditWatch Negative (a step beyond Heightened Monitoring), signaling a likely near-term downgrade.
calculation_or_rule: Downside scenario = CreditWatch Negative.
notes: Escalation path: Heightened Monitoring -> CreditWatch Negative on evidence the covenant/ATM path is deteriorating.

description: Estimated probability of default rises — near-term (12-month) or cumulative-to-2029.
calculation_or_rule: 12-mo PD warning if > 10%. Current 12-mo PD ~3-5% (low); cumulative-to-2029 ~25-35%.
notes: Downside 12-mo PD ~15-25%, cumulative ~65-75%. Cumulative PD is contingent on continued equity access; near-term default risk is low.

description: BBDC marks its Coherus loan/royalty position below cost (or the loan below ~90% of par) at a reporting date.
metric: BBDC fair value vs cost (combined loan + royalty)
source_name: BBDC Q1 2026 SOI / Orion valuation workbook
calculation_or_rule: Combined FV 5,429 / cost 5,172 = 105% (above cost); loan FV ~96.1% of par. Warning if FV < cost; critical if loan < 90% of par.
notes: Loan vs royalty split is an Orion estimate; QoQ FV change Information Unavailable (needs BBDC line-item SOI). Track each BBDC quarter (next ~2026-08-06).

description: BBDC places the Coherus loan on non-accrual status — a direct signal of expected non-payment.
metric: Accrual status of BBDC Coherus loan
source_name: BBDC Q1 2026 SOI / Orion valuation workbook
calculation_or_rule: Event: BBDC reports the position on non-accrual. Currently cash-pay, no PIK, performing.
notes: BBDC portfolio non-accruals ~1.0% of FV (0.6% ex-Sierra) at 3/31/26; Coherus is NOT among them. Interest is quarterly cash-pay (no PIK).

description: A material FDA action affecting LOQTORZI (label change, safety signal, CRL on a supplement, manufacturing/inspection finding).
current_value: No adverse action; LOQTORZI approved all-lines R/M NPC
calculation_or_rule: Event: any material FDA development for LOQTORZI or pipeline.
notes: Orphan exclusivity to 2030-10-27; BPCIA to 2035-10-27. Single-source API from Junshi (China) is a supply/regulatory concentration risk.

description: A competing PD-1/IO product is approved or launched in NPC — directly pressures LOQTORZI's sole-product franchise.
current_value: Penpulimab (Akeso) FDA-approved Apr 2025; not yet U.S.-launched
required_action: Monitor penpulimab U.S. launch timing, labeling and NPC positioning; model share/pricing impact on the LOQTORZI ramp (Downside penpulimab effect already embedded).
calculation_or_rule: Event: competitor approval/launch in NPC. Penpulimab approved but pre-launch.
notes: Penpulimab is the key competitive catalyst; a U.S. launch escalates this to Triggered. Downside scenario embeds a penpulimab revenue effect.

description: A LOQTORZI clinical readout or commercial catalyst (positive or negative) that moves the enterprise-value / recovery narrative.
current_value: Multiple 2026-2027 readouts pending (ZM008 combo; casdozokitug HCC Ph2 mid-2026)
required_action: Track the casdozokitug HCC Phase 2 (toripalimab combo) readout guided mid-2026 and the Zumutor ZM008 combination program; update EV/recovery on data.
calculation_or_rule: Event: any LOQTORZI clinical/commercial catalyst. Pipeline expansion supports the long-term EV narrative underpinning recovery.
notes: JUPITER-02 6-yr OS supportive; Zumutor ZM008 (anti-LLT1) combo announced Jun 2026. Positive readouts improve financing access; a negative pivotal readout is the key downside.

description: A regulatory or government investigation is disclosed (SEC, DOJ, FDA/OIG, healthcare/FCPA).
calculation_or_rule: Event: any disclosed investigation. Loan requires prompt notice of Health Care/FDA matters that could cause a MAC.
notes: None disclosed through the latest filing.

description: Material litigation is filed or adversely developed (IP challenge, product liability, securities, contract).
calculation_or_rule: Event: material litigation. EoD if a final money judgment > $5M is not stayed/bonded within 30 days.
notes: IP protection of LOQTORZI is core collateral; monitor patent/Junshi-license disputes especially.

description: Departure of a key executive (CEO, CFO, CMO) or multiple senior leaders.
calculation_or_rule: Event: 8-K Item 5.02 key-officer departure.
notes: Leadership stable through the latest filing.

description: A change of independent auditor is disclosed; distinguish routine changes from those involving disagreements or accounting concerns.
current_value: EY -> PwC effective FY2026 (disclosed June 2026); no disagreements
required_action: Confirm the first PwC-audited FY2026 10-K carries no going-concern qualification and no new material weaknesses.
calculation_or_rule: Event: auditor change. A ROUTINE change with no disagreements/accounting concerns = Neutral (per Orion convention).
notes: EY->PwC effective FY2026, no disclosed disagreements -> Neutral, not Negative. Separately, a prior inventory-reconciliation ICFR material weakness (FY2024) was resolved as of 12/31/2025.

description: Coherus engages restructuring/turnaround advisers or explores strategic alternatives under distress — a strong pre-default signal.
calculation_or_rule: Event: restructuring adviser engagement or distressed strategic process.
notes: None disclosed. Would typically precede the Downside covenant-breach pathway (~Q3 2027).

description: A going-concern qualification or substantial-doubt disclosure appears in the audit opinion or MD&A (ASC 205-40).
calculation_or_rule: Contains: 'going concern' / 'substantial doubt' in audit opinion or MD&A.
notes: The loan expressly PERMITS a going-concern qualification (it is not itself a default) — but it would be a major red flag and likely accompany covenant stress.

description: Any other materially negative development not captured by a specific rule (supply disruption, reimbursement cut, partnership loss, adverse Junshi-license change).
current_value: Overall news signal Neutral (single-product concentration; Q1'26 sequential rev dip; TSA cash caveat)
required_action: Triage each new material item; reclassify to a specific alert and reassess scenario weighting when a discrete negative event occurs.
calculation_or_rule: Catch-all for material negatives outside the specific rules above.
notes: Overall Orion signal Neutral: positive structural/deleveraging tilt (UDENYCA/CIMERLI/YUSIMRY divestitures; convertibles retired) vs single-product concentration and liquidity/ATM dependency.
